blended.narrative: Powderhorn is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,069 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
